name: substr_cpy_off
title: substr_cpy_off
syntax: void substr_cpy_off(char dest[], long destOffset, char src[], long srcStart, long len, long max);
description: This function copies a substring of src to dest. max indicates the the size of dest in bytes. The function ensures that there is a terminating ‘\0’. Thus, a maximum of max-1-destOffset bytes are copied.

parameters.name: destOffset
parameters.description: Offset in bytes in destination buffer

parameters.name: srcStart
parameters.description: Start index in bytes in src of substring

parameters.name: len
parameters.description: Length of the substring in bytes, or -1 to copy the string until the end

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
